GigaCode
  • API Reference
  • Index Manager
  • View page source

Index Manager

gigacode.index_manager.IndexManager handles FAISS and BM25 index caching and management.

Overview

The IndexManager is responsible for:

  • Creating and maintaining FAISS indices for semantic search

  • Creating and maintaining BM25 indices for lexical search

  • Automatic index selection based on buffer size

  • Caching indices in memory

  • Garbage collection of unused indices

Core Class

class gigacode.index_manager.IndexManager(embedder: Embedder, embedding_dim: int, max_buffers: int, work_dir: Path, use_gpu: bool = True, gpu_id: int = 0, prometheus_exporter: Any | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Manage FAISS/Lexical indices and query caching.

Responsibilities: - Maintain LRU-bounded cache of FAISS indices (GPU/CPU) - Maintain LRU-bounded cache of BM25 lexical indices - Handle query result caching with paraphrase detection - Manage GPU memory (sync, eviction, monitoring) - Track metrics (cache hits, GPU usage, operation latency) - Rebuild indices on demand (called from BufferManager)

Parameters:

  • embedder – Embedder instance for vector operations.

  • embedding_dim – Dimension of embeddings.

  • max_buffers – Max indices in memory (LRU limit).

  • work_dir – Root directory for index persistence.

  • use_gpu – Enable GPU FAISS indices.

  • gpu_id – GPU device ID.

  • prometheus_exporter – Optional metrics exporter.

Initialize IndexManager.

__init__(embedder: Embedder, embedding_dim: int, max_buffers: int, work_dir: Path, use_gpu: bool = True, gpu_id: int = 0, prometheus_exporter: Any | None = None) → None[source]

Initialize IndexManager.

load_buffer_state(buffer_id: str) → tuple[GpuIndex | None, list[CodeChunk] | None, np.ndarray | None][source]

Load all buffer state from disk.

Returns:

(index, chunks, embeddings) tuple.

create_indices(buffer_id: str, embeddings: ndarray, chunks: list[CodeChunk]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Create and cache indices from embeddings.

Parameters:

  • buffer_id – Buffer identifier.

  • embeddings – Embedding vectors.

  • chunks – Code chunks.

Returns:

Status dict with index info.

clear_query_cache() → None[source]

Clear all cached queries.

get_cache_stats() → dict[str, Any][source]

Get FAISS and lexical cache utilization.

Returns:

Dict with cache statistics.

health_check() → dict[str, Any][source]

Check index system health.

Returns:

Dict with health status and diagnostics.

close() → None[source]

Clean up GPU memory and close resources.

Key Methods

Index Creation

Create or retrieve a FAISS index for a buffer:

index = manager.get_or_create_faiss_index(
    buffer_id="my_project",
    embeddings=embeddings,
    embedding_dim=384
)

Index Retrieval

Retrieve an existing FAISS index:

index = manager.get_faiss_index(buffer_id="my_project")
if index is None:
    print("Index not found")

Index Invalidation

Clear a cached index:

manager.invalidate_index(buffer_id="my_project")

Garbage Collection

Clean up unused indices:

manager.cleanup_indices()

Phase 3 Integration

The IndexManager automatically uses gigacode.incremental_indexer.IncrementalIndexManager for efficient updates:

  • When files change, only changed chunks are re-embedded

  • Embeddings are cached and reused

  • 5-50x faster commits compared to full re-indexing

Example: Incremental Update

from gigacode.index_manager import IndexManager
from gigacode.incremental_indexer import IncrementalIndexManager

manager = IndexManager(embedder=embedder)

# Files are changed
# Manager automatically:
# 1. Detects which chunks changed
# 2. Only re-embeds changed chunks
# 3. Reuses embeddings for unchanged chunks
# 4. Updates index with new embeddings

Configuration

from gigacode.index_manager import IndexManager

manager = IndexManager(
    embedder=embedder,
    max_indices=10,  # Max concurrent indices
    auto_gc=True,  # Auto cleanup unused
    gc_interval=3600  # Cleanup every hour
)

See Also

  • gigacode.incremental_indexer.IncrementalIndexManager - Incremental updates

  • gigacode.faiss_optimizer.FAISSIndexOptimizer - Index optimization

  • gigacode.gpu_index.GpuIndex - GPU-accelerated indices
